reviews.comment:
Atienden muy bien y la nafta es la correcta.

(Translated by Google)
They provide excellent service and the fuel is the right kind.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM4bTdhY2tBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Tuve una pésima experiencia esta mañana, alrededor de las 8AM, con un playero, de nombre Christian, que me prepoteo, me insulto e incluso me increpo como para pegarme. No había nadie responsable para tomarme la queja. Están de testigo las personas de seguridad. Realmente una vergüenza que tengan gente con esa actitud trabajando.

(Translated by Google)
I had a terrible experience this morning, around 8 AM, with a beach attendant named Christian. He was aggressive, insulted me, and even threatened to hit me. There was no one in charge to take my complaint. Security personnel witnessed it. It's truly shameful that they have people with that attitude working there.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM4dC0tWGpnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Hoy fui a las 6:10 de la mañana y uno de los playeros q no quiso darme nombre, al no poder abrir la puerta del dispenser de nafta, por falla mecánica, me ninguneo de forma misogena, por su forma d explicarme cual era la palanca para abrirla. La verdad una falta de respeto, q a mi no me afecta, porque se defenderme de ese tipo de personas, pero a otras mujeres puede ser muy hiriente

(Translated by Google)
Today I went at 6:10 in the morning, and one of the attendants, who wouldn't give me his name, was unable to open the gas pump door due to a mechanical failure. He belittled me in a misogynistic way, judging by the way he explained which lever to use. It was truly disrespectful, and while it doesn't bother me because I know how to defend myself against that kind of person, it could be very hurtful to other women.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM4Nl8zSk9BEAE

reviews.comment:
Recomendado por la rápida atención en el lavado. Pero caro para pagar un servicio comun y el servicio final de secado no es bueno..

(Translated by Google)
Recommended for the quick service during washing. But expensive for a basic service, and the final drying service isn't good.
